faqs.question: What is refund policy?
faqs.answer: You can request a refund within 7 days of purchase.

faqs.question: How can I contact support?
faqs.answer: You can email us at support@mail.com.

faqs.question: What are your working hours?
faqs.answer: We are available from 9 AM to 6 PM.

faqs.question: How to track my order?
faqs.answer: You can track your order from the orders section.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel before it is shipped.

faqs.question: How long does delivery take?
faqs.answer: Delivery usually takes 3-5 business days.

faqs.question: Do you offer international shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide.

faqs.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: We accept cards, UPI, and net banking.

faqs.question: Is cash on delivery available?
faqs.answer: Yes, cash on delivery is available in selected areas.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Click on 'Forgot Password' and follow instructions.

faqs.question: How to update my profile?
faqs.answer: Go to account settings to update your profile.

faqs.question: Can I change my email address?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can change it in profile settings.

faqs.question: How do I delete my account?
faqs.answer: Please contact support to delete your account.

faqs.question: Why is my payment failing?
faqs.answer: Check your payment details or try another method.

faqs.question: Do you provide invoices?
faqs.answer: Yes, invoices are available in your order history.

faqs.question: How to apply coupon code?
faqs.answer: Enter the coupon at checkout page.

faqs.question: Why is my coupon not working?
faqs.answer: Check expiry date or usage conditions.

faqs.question: Can I return a product?
faqs.answer: Yes, returns are accepted within 7 days.

faqs.question: How to request a return?
faqs.answer: Go to orders and click 'Return' option.

faqs.question: When will I get refund?
faqs.answer: Refund will be processed within 5-7 days.

faqs.question: Do you have customer support number?
faqs.answer: Yes, call us at 1800-123-456.

faqs.question: Is there any warranty?
faqs.answer: Yes, products come with warranty if applicable.

faqs.question: How to check warranty?
faqs.answer: Warranty details are mentioned on product page.

faqs.question: Can I exchange a product?
faqs.answer: Yes, exchange is available for selected items.

faqs.question: What if I receive damaged product?
faqs.answer: Report within 48 hours for replacement.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, check our offers section regularly.

faqs.question: How to subscribe to newsletter?
faqs.answer: Enter your email in subscription box.

faqs.question: Can I unsubscribe emails?
faqs.answer: Yes, click unsubscribe link in email.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use encryption to protect your data.

faqs.question: Do you share user data?
faqs.answer: No, we do not share personal data.

faqs.question: How to login to my account?
faqs.answer: Use your email and password to login.

faqs.question: Why can't I login?
faqs.answer: Check credentials or reset your password.

faqs.question: What is your company policy?
faqs.answer: Please check terms and conditions page.

faqs.question: Where is your company located?
faqs.answer: We are based in India.

faqs.question: How can I give feedback?
faqs.answer: You can submit feedback via contact form.

faqs.question: Do you have mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, available on Play Store.

faqs.question: How to update app?
faqs.answer: Update via app store.

faqs.question: Why app is not working?
faqs.answer: Try restarting or updating the app.

faqs.question: Do you offer support on weekends?
faqs.answer: Limited support is available on weekends.

faqs.question: How to change language?
faqs.answer: Go to settings and select language.
